description: Polyphonic retrigger feel: dense overlapping hits on a percussive sample with 1 s amp decay. Engine-level env (#627) means each retrigger resets the env -- for drum patterns this should be inaudible. Continuous audible output throughout the 2 s render confirms hits are firing and voices overlap.

assertions.name: audio_present_through_render
assertions.comment: 8 hits every 0.25s -- engine-level amp env retriggers on each hit so the audio dips between hits, but should stay above -50 dBFS for the bulk of the render (~88%)

assertions.name: all_eight_hit_peaks
assertions.comment: Each of the 8 hits produces ~50ms above -15 dBFS at the attack -- so 8 x 0.05s = 0.4s, conservative floor 0.32s

assertions.name: mid_render_voice_overlap
assertions.comment: By 0.5s several hits have fired (each with 1s decay tail) -- RMS should reflect overlapping voices, not a single decaying hit

assertions.name: final_hit_audible
assertions.comment: Final hit at step 14 (t=1.75s) should still produce a strong retrigger
